name: pptx-build
description: Generate clean, white-based PowerPoint (.pptx) files that don't look AI-made — built on python-pptx. Default mode: grid-anchored from-scratch layout with no drifting decorative bands. Template-fill mode: open a real corporate .pptx/.potx and write into its layouts and placeholders, inheriting the template's master/theme/fonts/logos. LibreOffice preview pass included.
